title: Unique Party 19991 - Metallic Balloon Pick Birthday Candles, Pack of 6
features: Pack of 6 Metallic Balloon Pick Birthday Candles
Great for any birthday party or milestone celebration
Quick and easy way to decorate any type of cake
Combine with other birthday party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Bring some shiny style to any birthday cake with these metallic balloon shaped birthday candles. These toothpick candles feature assorted colour balloon shapes, and are sure to bring a smile to the guest of honor's face as they make their special birthday wish. Use them to put a festive finishing touch to any cake, whether it’s a traditional birthday cake or a batch of cupcakes. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended, monitor burn time, and properly dispose of remnants.
